word: H6560 - פֶּרֶץ עֻזָּא - Perets ʻUzzâʼ - peh'-rets ooz-zaw' - Perezuzza

sections.paragraph:
Original: פּרץ עזּא

Transliteration: perets ‛ûzzâ'

Phonetic: peh'-rets ooz-zaw'

BDB Definition:

Perez-uzza = "breach of Uzza"
  1. the place where Uzzah was slain by God for touching the Ark; located close to Jerusalem

Origin: from H6556 and H5798

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
